raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 353 requires internet service providers operating in California to offer affordable home internet to eligible California residents.",
    "The Affordable Connectivity Program (ACP) benefited approximately three million California households in 2024.",
    "The lack of federal action on broadband subsidies has created a gap in internet access for citizens.",
    "Many Californians are struggling with the high cost of living, impacting their ability to afford broadband internet.",
    "Children without affordable access to broadband cannot turn in their homework.",
    "People without broadband access cannot access telehealth appointments.",
    "People without broadband cannot apply for jobs online.",
    "Broadband affordability is considered an essential service that must be accessible for all Californians."
  ]
}
```
